title: export-bundle output data
description:
The assembled publication bundle's provenance + honest verify verdict.

Every field describes the bundle by PROVENANCE (where it landed, which seed
+ runs it covers, how many members, the seal) or by the CODE-emitted honest
verdict + disclosure ledger — never by the meaning of any sealed member. The
``verify_manifest`` rides as a bare ``dict`` so the closed BUNDLE-MEMBER
vocabulary and the per-link classification stay an ops-layer contract, out of
the boundary schema (the ``export-dossier`` ``manifest`` posture).

seed_kind.description: Which seed reference the bundle was composed from.
seed_kind.title: Seed Kind

primary_run_id.description: The run whose sealed stores seeded the dossier gather.
primary_run_id.title: Primary Run Id

run_ids.description: The run ids whose dossier stores were sealed, in lineage order (newest first) when include_lineage is set; otherwise the primary run.
run_ids.title: Run Ids

disclosures.description: The union-of-disclosures ledger: every disclosed gap across the dossier, the recipe, the cite-check, and the env/data/provenance legs. Disclosed, never a failure.
disclosures.title: Disclosures

verify_manifest.description: The top-level VERIFY manifest: bundle_schema_version, the path-sorted member entries, the per-link MECHANICAL/DISCLOSED/ABSENT classification, the disclosure ledger, the code-emitted verdict, the offline-verify recipe, and bundle_sha256. Self-attesting.
verify_manifest.title: Verify Manifest
